title: acalypha reflexa
intro: Acalypha reflexa, also known as the fan-leaved copperleaf, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Acalypha reflexa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms associated with fever and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
